name: commute-and-weather
description: Should-I-bike-today decisions. Cross-references today's calendar × weather (Open-Meteo, free) × user-defined commute rules. Voice-callable: 'should I bike today', 'do I need a jacket'.
core_description: User-invocable: 'should I bike today', 'do I need a jacket', 'is it a good walk day', 'do I need an umbrella'. Delegate to core via `work`. Cross-references today's calendar (first physical meeting) × Open-Meteo weather × user's commute rules (notes/commute-rules.md, with sane defaults). Speaks a conversational verdict (green/yellow/red) with rationale.
